subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-02-02
subcodes.first_line: The glorious maturity of this world depends upon the realization of two things: The establishment of the era of universal Peace and the discovery or appearance of the hidden science which shall renovate all the conditions of existence.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @universal peace; world unity, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @alchemy; the elixir, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
